all.critique:
Below is a plain‐English review of the analysis, with notes on potential issues and their estimated severity:

1. Synthetic Label Mapping  
 • The analysis does a good job of outlining two cases (using embedded synthetic labels versus transferring labels via a maintained index mapping). However, it assumes that a mapping between synthetic nodes and real training nodes exists and is reliably maintained (either in Model or GraphData).
